# Roncyo (roncyo.com)

> Roncyo Open Platform — a developer-facing platform to build, distribute, and monetize digital products with advertising. Public site = introduction + docs (similar role to a “for developers” portal).

## What this site is

- Open Platform home: https://roncyo.com/
- Developer docs: https://roncyo.com/docs
- Getting started: https://roncyo.com/docs/getting-started
- About: https://roncyo.com/about
- Support: https://roncyo.com/support

## What this site is not

Not a consumer entertainment feed, catalog, or trial arcade.

## Documentation

| Doc | URL |
|-----|-----|
| Getting started | https://roncyo.com/docs/getting-started |
| Platform overview | https://roncyo.com/docs/overview |
| Distribution | https://roncyo.com/docs/distribution |
| Monetization | https://roncyo.com/docs/monetization |
| ads.txt | https://roncyo.com/docs/ads-txt |
| Integration | https://roncyo.com/docs/integration |

## Legal

- Privacy: https://roncyo.com/privacy-policy
- Terms: https://roncyo.com/terms-of-service
- Cookie policy: https://roncyo.com/cookie-policy
- Data deletion: https://roncyo.com/data-deletion

## Contact

Email: support@roncyo.com
